scope: S4096 layer-2 compressed-only sparse-MLA source-boundary dKV producer on 1xMI350

mechanism.base: D512 score page in one CTA, sourced directly from q, grad_output, output, lse, kv_bank, and LI route metadata without materialized P or scaled-dP slabs
mechanism.kv_reuse: Load each selected-KV D16 tile once and reuse it across all four H16 score-page head blocks before advancing D.
mechanism.multi_wave: Use four wavefronts in one CTA: one wavefront per H16 score-page head block, then one wavefront per D16 contribution consumer for four consecutive D blocks.
mechanism.limitation: This is still a dKV-only bring-up kernel. It does not produce dQ and does not implement a production grouped dKV epilogue.

decision.reason: The same-workgroup score-page producer/consumer idea is validated as a mechanism, but the raw rocWMMA bring-up remains 43.82 ms for dKV-only, about 3.94x slower than the current 11.13 ms full Triton sparse-attention backward boundary.
decision.next_step: Keep the source-boundary and same-workgroup score-page contract, but move to a lower-level CK/HIP/MFMA cooperative kernel with better occupancy and a real dQ+dKV boundary instead of extending this rocWMMA CTA shape.
